parsed_output.justification: Justin claimed to be the Seer but quickly undermined his own credibility by admitting he lied about the information he saw in the center to bait Mike. He further exhibited erratic behavior by suggesting he might be the Tanner and inviting the group to vote for him. Compared to Mike, who maintained a consistent story, Justin's contradictions and suspicious behavior make him the most likely candidate for elimination to help Team Village.
